vocab.meaning: bắt đầu dấn thân vào một sự nghiệp
vocab.example: Having recently graduated, I am about to embark on a career in digital marketing.

vocab.meaning: theo đuổi các bằng cấp cao hơn
vocab.example: I decided to pause my professional life to pursue further qualifications in sustainable development.

vocab.meaning: sự cân bằng giữa làm việc và học tập
vocab.example: As a part-time barista and full-time student, maintaining a healthy work-study balance is quite challenging.

vocab.meaning: nghề nghiệp hái ra tiền (thu nhập cao)
vocab.example: Software engineering is widely considered a lucrative profession in the current job market.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/nặng nề trong học thuật
vocab.example: The academic rigor of my law degree requires me to spend at least eight hours a day in the library.

vocab.meaning: sự tham gia trực tiếp vào thực tế
vocab.example: In my current role as a project coordinator, I value the hands-on involvement I have with each client.
International trade is my primary subject of specialization during this final year of university.
My internship mainly involves clerical duties, but I am learning a lot about how the office functions.

vocab.meaning: môi trường làm việc nhịp độ nhanh
vocab.example: I thrive in a fast-paced work environment where every day brings a new set of challenges.

vocab.meaning: sự ham học hỏi/tò mò về trí tuệ
vocab.example: Being a student allows me to satisfy my intellectual curiosity regarding historical linguistics.
